PROJECTS_PAGE.CARD_DESC: Integrated software solution for monitoring and controlling mechanical pumping in oil production.

ABOUT_PAGE.SUBTITLE: Enterprise Identity
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_P1: We are a company dedicated to the research and development of new technologies with an emphasis on cutting-edge applications and equipment for the Oil and Gas industry.
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_QUOTE: Our software is specifically designed to help obtain maximum performance from mechanical pumping systems.
ABOUT_PAGE.HISTORY_P2: By leveraging advanced data analysis and intelligent automation, our software offers benefits such as monitoring, analysis, and early detection of faults.
ABOUT_PAGE.MISSION_TEXT: Our mission is to provide our clients with innovative solutions that drive efficiency, sustainability, and profitability.
ABOUT_PAGE.VISION_TEXT: To be recognized globally as a leader in automation solutions.
ABOUT_PAGE.VALUES_TEXT: Our core values guide every decision and action we take.
ABOUT_PAGE.STAFF_DESC: We have a team of passionate and highly qualified professionals.

SMARTLINK.HERO_P1: The comprehensive solution that transforms field data into strategic decisions.
SMARTLINK.HERO_P2: your oil operations from anywhere, in real time.
SMARTLINK.CARD2_DESC: Go beyond simple monitoring. Track live data from sensors, production, and equipment status. Our dashboards allow you to visualize historical trends, track KPIs, and customize your view.
SMARTLINK.CARD4_DESC: Receive critical notifications instantly. Configure custom alerts to respond proactively to any anomaly.
SMARTLINK.CARD5_DESC: Execute actions directly from the interface, such as adjusting parameters or shutting down systems, securely and with authorization.
SMARTLINK.CARD6_DESC: Need a specific feature? Our platform is built to be flexible. We work with clients to develop and integrate new functionalities.

S3.DESC: We implement intelligent and automated control systems to optimize production.
